message:
chore(beads): audit session closeout on 2ot4f

GossipConfig bounds audit: defaults reasonable (10k objects/100k
symbols/100 request-ids/300s TTL/1000 batch/48*1000=48KB iblt cap at
16MB hard ceiling). All enforced at correct points in handle_summary
and IbltPlaceholder::decode_with_limits.

Observation: summary.iblt Vec<u8> deserialization uses serde_json which
allocates the Vec before the iblt.len() size check. Proper defense is
transport-layer byte cap before serde — not a gossip.rs bug, just a
reminder for whoever wires the wire layer.

Session totals: 5 concrete patches + 4 architectural gaps + 1 defense-
in-depth observation. Audit complete for the fcp-audit/fcp-mesh/
fcp-manifest/fcp-oauth scope.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
